result.summary: ml.googleapis.com exposes one Google Cloud HTTP API for AI Platform Training & Prediction, plus a related gcloud ai-platform CLI that authenticates with Google Cloud credentials.
result.description: ml.googleapis.com is the Google Cloud endpoint for the legacy AI Platform Training & Prediction API, used to create, manage, train, and invoke machine learning models. It is part of Google Cloud’s machine learning platform ecosystem.

gcp_oauth.label: Google Cloud OAuth 2.0 access token / Application Default Credentials
gcp_oauth.setup: For the easiest local setup, configure Application Default Credentials using [`gcloud auth application-default login`](https://docs.cloud.google.com/sdk/gcloud/reference/auth/application-default/login), then mint a token when needed with [`gcloud auth application-default print-access-token`](https://docs.cloud.google.com/sdk/gcloud/reference/auth/application-default/print-access-token). Google Cloud authentication docs also describe REST authentication and other ADC flows at [Authenticate to Google Cloud](https://docs.cloud.google.com/sdk/docs/authenticate).

gcp_api_key.label: Google Cloud API key
gcp_api_key.setup: Create and manage an API key from your Google Cloud project using the API Keys docs at [Manage API keys](https://docs.cloud.google.com/docs/authentication/api-keys). Google Cloud's auth docs also describe passing API keys to supported REST APIs at [Use API keys to access APIs](https://docs.cloud.google.com/docs/authentication/api-keys-use).
